desc.de: Dedizierte HSM-Instanzen (FIPS 140-2 Level 3). Volle Key-Kontrolle, PKCS#11/JCE/OpenSSL-Zugriff, Custom Key Store für KMS, Cluster-HA.
desc.en: Dedicated HSM instances (FIPS 140-2 Level 3). Full key control, PKCS#11/JCE/OpenSSL access, custom key store for KMS, cluster HA.

otcDesc.de: Kein Dedicated HSM auf OTC. OTC KMS nutzt shared HSMs im Backend — laut OTC-Doku als HSM-backed beschrieben, aber keine explizite FIPS 140-2 Level 3 Zertifizierung publiziert. Kein eigener HSM-Zugriff möglich.
otcDesc.en: No dedicated HSM on OTC. OTC KMS uses shared HSMs in the backend — described as HSM-backed in OTC docs, but no explicit FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certification published. No direct HSM access possible.

migration.de: **Kein Dedicated HSM.** OTC KMS nutzt shared HSMs im Backend (Encrypt/Decrypt/Sign/Verify mit RSA/ECC/AES), aber eine FIPS 140-2 Level 3 Zertifizierung ist nicht öffentlich dokumentiert — bei Compliance-Anforderungen T-Systems nach Zertifikat fragen. **Kein PKCS#11-Zugriff.** Kein direkter PKCS#11-, JCE- oder OpenSSL-Zugriff wie bei CloudHSM. Kein Custom Key Store. **Key-Transfer.** Key-Export aus CloudHSM ist bei non-extractable Keys nicht möglich — in OTC KMS neu generieren. Alle abhängigen Zertifikate und Signaturen müssen erneuert werden. **Vault-Alternative.** HashiCorp Vault Transit auf CCE (PKCS#11-kompatibel) für erweiterte Crypto-Operationen.
migration.en: **No Dedicated HSM.** OTC KMS uses shared HSMs in the backend (encrypt/decrypt/sign/verify with RSA/ECC/AES), but FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certification is not publicly documented — ask T-Systems for certificate if compliance requires it. **No PKCS#11 access.** No direct PKCS#11, JCE, or OpenSSL access as with CloudHSM. No custom key store. **Key transfer.** Key export from CloudHSM not possible for non-extractable keys — regenerate in OTC KMS. All dependent certificates and signatures must be renewed. **Vault alternative.** HashiCorp Vault Transit on CCE (PKCS#11-compatible) for extended crypto operations.

desc.de: Key Management Service. Symmetrische/asymmetrische CMKs, automatische Rotation (konfigurierbar 90-2560 Tage), Key Import, Grants, Multi-Region Keys, Audit via CloudTrail.
desc.en: Key Management Service. Symmetric/asymmetric CMKs, automatic rotation (configurable 90-2560 days), key import, grants, multi-region keys, audit via CloudTrail.

otcDesc.de: Zentrale Schlüsselverwaltung: AES_256 (symmetrisch), RSA_2048/3072/4096, EC_P256/P384 (asymmetrisch), HMAC. HSM-backed. Automatische jährliche Rotation. Key-Import (BYOK) unterstützt. Integration mit OBS, EVS, IMS, SFS, RDS, DDS, GaussDB. Audit über CTS.
otcDesc.en: Central key management: AES_256 (symmetric), RSA_2048/3072/4096, EC_P256/P384 (asymmetric), HMAC. HSM-backed. Automatic annual rotation. Key import (BYOK) supported. Integration with OBS, EVS, IMS, SFS, RDS, DDS, GaussDB. Audit via CTS.

migration.de: **Algorithmen & FIPS.** OTC KMS unterstützt AES_256, RSA_2048/3072/4096, EC_P256/P384 und HMAC. HSM-backed, aber FIPS 140-2 Level 3 Zertifizierung nicht öffentlich dokumentiert — bei Compliance T-Systems fragen. **Rotation & Policies.** Automatische Key-Rotation nur jährlich fest (AWS: konfigurierbar 90–2560 Tage). Key Policies und Grants haben kein direktes Pendant — Berechtigungen über IAM Agencies steuern. **Kein Multi-Region.** Multi-Region Keys existieren nicht. **BYOK-Wrapping.** Key-Import (BYOK) wird unterstützt, Wrapping-Algorithmus ist RSA_OAEP_SHA_256 (AWS bietet zusätzlich RSA_OAEP_SHA_1 und SM2PKE). **Daten-Reencryption.** Mit AWS KMS verschlüsselte Daten müssen entschlüsselt und mit OTC KMS neu verschlüsselt werden — kein Key-Transfer möglich. Integration mit OBS, EVS, IMS, SFS, RDS, DDS, GaussDB.
migration.en: **Algorithms & FIPS.** OTC KMS supports AES_256, RSA_2048/3072/4096, EC_P256/P384, and HMAC. HSM-backed, but FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certification not publicly documented — ask T-Systems for compliance. **Rotation & policies.** Automatic key rotation only annually fixed (AWS: configurable 90–2560 days). Key Policies and Grants have no direct equivalent — manage permissions via IAM Agencies. **No multi-region.** Multi-Region Keys don't exist. **BYOK wrapping.** Key import (BYOK) supported, wrapping algorithm is RSA_OAEP_SHA_256 (AWS additionally offers RSA_OAEP_SHA_1 and SM2PKE). **Data re-encryption.** Data encrypted with AWS KMS must be decrypted and re-encrypted with OTC KMS — no key transfer possible. Integration with OBS, EVS, IMS, SFS, RDS, DDS, GaussDB.

equivNote.de: OTC KMS unterstützt AES_256, RSA (2048/3072/4096), ECC (P256/P384) und HMAC. HSM-backed (FIPS-Zertifizierung nicht öffentlich dokumentiert). Automatische Rotation nur jährlich fest (AWS: 90–2560 Tage konfigurierbar). Key-Import (BYOK) mit RSA-Wrapping. Kein Multi-Region Key, kein eigenständiges Key Policy Document, weniger Condition Keys. Grants vorhanden aber eingeschränkter.
equivNote.en: OTC KMS supports AES_256, RSA (2048/3072/4096), ECC (P256/P384), and HMAC. HSM-backed (FIPS certification not publicly documented). Automatic rotation only annually fixed (AWS: configurable 90-2560 days). Key import (BYOK) with RSA wrapping. No multi-region keys, no standalone key policy document, fewer condition keys. Grants available but more limited.

desc.de: Web Application Firewall. Managed Rules (AWS + Marketplace), Custom Rules, Bot Control, Fraud Control, IP Sets, Rate-based Rules, Integration mit CloudFront/ALB/API GW/AppSync.
desc.en: Web Application Firewall. Managed rules (AWS + Marketplace), custom rules, bot control, fraud control, IP sets, rate-based rules, integration with CloudFront/ALB/API GW/AppSync.

otcDesc.de: Zwei Modi: Cloud-WAF (DNS-basiert, CNAME-Umleitung) und Dedicated WAF (eigene WAF-Instanzen hinter ELB). OWASP Top 10, CC-Protection, Anti-Crawler (Script/Scanner/Search-Engine), Geolocation-Kontrolle, Web Tamper Protection, IP-Blacklist/Whitelist, Precise Protection, Information Leakage Prevention, Data Masking. Logging nach LTS, Monitoring via Cloud Eye. Schützt HTTP/HTTPS-Websites.
otcDesc.en: Two modes: Cloud WAF (DNS-based, CNAME redirect) and Dedicated WAF (own WAF instances behind ELB). OWASP Top 10, CC protection, anti-crawler (script/scanner/search-engine), geolocation control, web tamper protection, IP blacklist/whitelist, precise protection, information leakage prevention, data masking. Logging to LTS, monitoring via Cloud Eye. Protects HTTP/HTTPS websites.

migration.de: **Deployment-Modi.** Cloud-WAF (DNS-basiert, CNAME-Umleitung, shared) und Dedicated WAF (eigene Instanzen hinter ELB, bessere Performance, VPC-intern). **Regel-Umfang.** OWASP Top 10, CC Attack Protection (entspricht Rate-based Rules), Anti-Crawler, Geolocation Access Control, Web Tamper Protection, IP Blacklist/Whitelist, Information Leakage Prevention, Data Masking, Known Attack Source Blocking. **Fehlende Bot-Kontrolle.** AWS WAF Bot Control, Fraud Control und Account Takeover Prevention haben kein direktes Pendant — OTC Anti-Crawler ist weniger granular. **Keine Managed Rules.** Managed Rule Groups (AWS Marketplace) fehlen — eigene Regeln schreiben oder WAF-Anbieter (z.B. Cloudflare) vorschalten. **Logging & Scope.** WAF Logging → LTS. WAF schützt ELB/APIG und Dedicated-Instanzen, nicht direkt Compute. Caching nur auf Dedicated Gateway.
migration.en: **Deployment modes.** Cloud WAF (DNS-based, CNAME redirect, shared) and Dedicated WAF (own instances behind ELB, better performance, VPC-internal). **Rule scope.** OWASP Top 10, CC Attack Protection (corresponds to rate-based rules), anti-crawler, geolocation access control, web tamper protection, IP blacklist/whitelist, information leakage prevention, data masking, Known Attack Source Blocking. **No bot control.** AWS WAF Bot Control, Fraud Control, and Account Takeover Prevention have no direct equivalent — OTC anti-crawler is less granular. **No managed rules.** Managed Rule Groups (AWS Marketplace) are missing — write custom rules or put WAF provider (e.g. Cloudflare) in front. **Logging & scope.** WAF Logging → LTS. WAF protects ELB/APIG and dedicated instances, not compute directly. Caching only on Dedicated Gateway.

equivNote.de: OTC WAF bietet Cloud-WAF (DNS/CNAME) und Dedicated WAF (eigene Instanzen). OWASP Top 10, CC Protection, Anti-Crawler, Geolocation, IP-Blacklisting vorhanden. Kein AWS WAF Bot Control, kein Managed Rule Groups (Marketplace), keine Firewall Manager Integration, kein Rate-based Rules API-Format — CC Protection ist anders konfiguriert.
equivNote.en: OTC WAF offers Cloud WAF (DNS/CNAME) and Dedicated WAF (own instances). OWASP Top 10, CC protection, anti-crawler, geolocation, IP blacklisting available. No AWS WAF Bot Control, no managed rule groups (marketplace), no Firewall Manager integration, no rate-based rules API format — CC protection is configured differently.

desc.de: Automatisiertes Vulnerability Scanning für EC2, ECR-Images und Lambda. CVE-DB (NVD), CIS Benchmarks, Software Bill of Materials (SBOM), Network Reachability, agentless + agent-basiert.
desc.en: Automated vulnerability scanning for EC2, ECR images and Lambda. CVE DB (NVD), CIS benchmarks, software bill of materials (SBOM), network reachability, agentless + agent-based.

otcDesc.de: HSS (Host Security Service) mit vier Editionen: Enterprise (Vulnerability Scan, Baseline Check, Asset Discovery, Intrusion Detection), Premium (+ Ransomware Protection, File Integrity, Application Protection), WTP (+ Web Tamper Protection), Container (+ Container Image Scan, Runtime Protection, Cluster Protection). Agent-basiert (UniAgent). Kein agentless Scanning.
otcDesc.en: HSS (Host Security Service) with four editions: Enterprise (vulnerability scan, baseline check, asset discovery, intrusion detection), Premium (+ ransomware protection, file integrity, application protection), WTP (+ web tamper protection), Container (+ container image scan, runtime protection, cluster protection). Agent-based (UniAgent). No agentless scanning.

alt.de: Trivy, Wazuh, OpenSCAP, Qualys, OTC Vulnerability Scan Service (VSS)
alt.en: Trivy, Wazuh, OpenSCAP, Qualys, OTC Vulnerability Scan Service (VSS)

migration.de: **Agent-Pflicht.** HSS erfordert UniAgent auf jeder Instanz — kein agentless Scanning wie Inspector. **Editionen.** Enterprise (Vuln Scan + Baseline + Asset Discovery + Intrusion Detection), Premium (+ Ransomware + File Integrity + Application Protection), WTP (+ Web Tamper Protection), Container (+ Image Scan + Runtime + Cluster Protection). **Container-Scanning.** Nur in Container Edition verfügbar (Aufpreis). Kein automatischer Scan bei SWR Push. **Fehlend.** Inspector Network Reachability Analysis, Lambda Function Scanning und SBOM-Export haben kein Pendant.
migration.en: **Agent required.** HSS requires UniAgent on every instance — no agentless scanning like Inspector. **Editions.** Enterprise (vuln scan + baseline + asset discovery + intrusion detection), Premium (+ ransomware + file integrity + application protection), WTP (+ web tamper protection), Container (+ image scan + runtime + cluster protection). **Container scanning.** Only in Container edition (surcharge). No automatic scan on SWR push. **Missing.** Inspector Network Reachability Analysis, Lambda Function Scanning, and SBOM export have no equivalent.

equivNote.de: HSS ist agent-basiert (kein agentless Scanning). Vier Editionen von Enterprise bis Container mit unterschiedlichem Funktionsumfang. Kein Network Reachability Analysis, kein Lambda Scanning, kein SBOM-Export. Dafür zusätzlich: Virus Scanning, Intrusion Detection und File Integrity.
equivNote.en: HSS is agent-based (no agentless scanning). Four editions from Enterprise to Container with different feature scope. No network reachability analysis, no Lambda scanning, no SBOM export. Additional features: virus scanning, intrusion detection, and file integrity.

tfNote.de: Nur Host Protection konfigurierbar. Scan-Policies und Vulnerability-Reports nicht per TF steuerbar.
tfNote.en: Only host protection configurable. Scan policies and vulnerability reports not manageable via TF.

desc.de: Zentrales Security Dashboard. Aggregiert Findings von GuardDuty, Inspector, Macie, Firewall Manager. CIS/PCI-DSS/NIST Compliance Checks. ASFF-Format, Automated Response.
desc.en: Central security dashboard. Aggregates findings from GuardDuty, Inspector, Macie, Firewall Manager. CIS/PCI-DSS/NIST compliance checks. ASFF format, automated response.

otcDesc.de: Kein zentraler Security-Findings-Aggregator. HSS Dashboard bietet Security Score und Risiko-Übersicht, aber nur für HSS-Findings. SecMaster (cloud-native SIEM/SOAR mit Asset-, Posture-, Incident-Management) laut Roadmap für H1 2027 geplant. Bis dahin: CTS + Cloud Eye + HSS als Einzellösungen.
otcDesc.en: No central security findings aggregator. HSS Dashboard provides security score and risk overview, but only for HSS findings. SecMaster (cloud-native SIEM/SOAR with asset, posture, incident management) planned per roadmap for H1 2027. Until then: CTS + Cloud Eye + HSS as individual solutions.

alt.de: Wazuh SIEM, ELK/Splunk, Grafana, OTC HSS Dashboard (begrenzt)
alt.en: Wazuh SIEM, ELK/Splunk, Grafana, OTC HSS Dashboard (limited)

migration.de: **Kein Aggregator.** Kein zentraler Security-Findings-Aggregator auf OTC. HSS bietet ein Dashboard mit Security Score, aber nur für eigene Findings (kein Cross-Service-Aggregator). **SecMaster-Roadmap.** SecMaster (SIEM/SOAR mit Cloud Security Posture Management, Asset Management, Incident Management) ist laut OTC Roadmap für H1 2027 angekündigt. **Interim-Lösung.** CTS für Audit-Logs, Cloud Eye für Metriken-basierte Alarme, HSS für Host/Container-Security kombinieren. **Compliance-Checks.** CIS-, PCI-DSS-Checks müssen mit externen Tools (Prowler, ScoutSuite, Wazuh) selbst durchgeführt werden.
migration.en: **No aggregator.** No central security findings aggregator on OTC. HSS offers a dashboard with security score, but only for its own findings (no cross-service aggregator). **SecMaster roadmap.** SecMaster (SIEM/SOAR with cloud security posture management, asset management, incident management) is announced per OTC roadmap for H1 2027. **Interim solution.** Combine CTS for audit logs, Cloud Eye for metrics-based alarms, HSS for host/container security. **Compliance checks.** CIS, PCI DSS checks must be performed with external tools (Prowler, ScoutSuite, Wazuh).

desc.de: ML-basierte Bedrohungserkennung. Analysiert CloudTrail, VPC Flow Logs, DNS-Logs, S3-Daten-Events, EKS Audit Logs, Lambda Network Activity. Automatische Findings ohne Agent-Installation.
desc.en: ML-based threat detection. Analyzes CloudTrail, VPC Flow Logs, DNS logs, S3 data events, EKS audit logs, Lambda network activity. Automatic findings without agent installation.

otcDesc.de: Kein ML-basierter Threat Detection Service auf Cloud-Ebene. HSS (Host Security Service) bietet auf Host-Ebene: Brute-Force-Erkennung, abnormale Login-Erkennung, Reverse Shell Detection, Malware-Erkennung, Web Shell Detection, Process Anomaly Detection. Agent-basiert (UniAgent auf ECS installieren).
otcDesc.en: No ML-based threat detection service at cloud level. HSS (Host Security Service) provides at host level: brute-force detection, abnormal login detection, reverse shell detection, malware detection, web shell detection, process anomaly detection. Agent-based (install UniAgent on ECS).

alt.de: Wazuh, Suricata IDS, OTC HSS Intrusion Detection (Host-Ebene)
alt.en: Wazuh, Suricata IDS, OTC HSS Intrusion Detection (host-level)

migration.de: **Kein Cloud-Level Pendant.** GuardDuty analysiert Cloud-APIs und Netzwerk agentless — das gibt es auf OTC nicht. **HSS als Teilersatz.** Host-basierte Intrusion Detection (agent-basiert): Brute-Force, abnormale Logins, Reverse Shells, Web Shells, Malware, Process Anomalies, Ransomware Protection. **Log-Korrelation.** Automatische Korrelation von VPC Flow Logs, DNS-Logs und CTS-Events fehlt. Muss mit externem SIEM nachgebaut werden (Wazuh, ELK, Splunk). **Ergänzende Services.** CTS für API-Audit-Logs, DBSS für Datenbank-Sicherheit.
migration.en: **No cloud-level equivalent.** GuardDuty analyzes cloud APIs and network agentlessly — this doesn't exist on OTC. **HSS as partial replacement.** Host-based intrusion detection (agent-based): brute-force, abnormal logins, reverse shells, web shells, malware, process anomalies, ransomware protection. **Log correlation.** Automatic correlation of VPC Flow Logs, DNS logs, and CTS events is missing. Must be rebuilt with external SIEM (Wazuh, ELK, Splunk). **Supplementary services.** CTS for API audit logs, DBSS for database security.

desc.de: Managed Secrets-Speicher mit automatischer Rotation (Lambda-basiert). KMS-Verschlüsselung, Cross-Region Replication, Resource-based Policies, native RDS/Redshift/DocumentDB-Integration.
desc.en: Managed secrets store with automatic rotation (Lambda-based). KMS encryption, cross-region replication, resource-based policies, native RDS/Redshift/DocumentDB integration.

otcDesc.de: CSMS laut OTC Portfolio-Roadmap ab 01.05.2026 geplant. Erwarteter Funktionsumfang: Lifecycle-Management für Credentials, KMS-Verschlüsselung, API-Zugriff. Bis dahin: HashiCorp Vault auf CCE (empfohlen) oder Kubernetes Secrets mit KMS-Verschlüsselung als Workaround.
otcDesc.en: CSMS planned per OTC portfolio roadmap from 2026-05-01. Expected scope: lifecycle management for credentials, KMS encryption, API access. Until then: HashiCorp Vault on CCE (recommended) or Kubernetes Secrets with KMS encryption as workaround.

alt.de: HashiCorp Vault (auf CCE), Kubernetes Secrets + KMS, Ansible Vault
alt.en: HashiCorp Vault (on CCE), Kubernetes Secrets + KMS, Ansible Vault

migration.de: **CSMS noch nicht verfügbar.** OTC CSMS (Cloud Secret Management Service) ist per Roadmap bestätigt, aber erst ab 01.05.2026 verfügbar. Erwarteter Umfang: Lifecycle-Management für Credentials mit KMS-Verschlüsselung — ob automatische Rotation, Cross-Region Replication und Resource-based Policies unterstützt werden, ist noch unklar. **Interim-Lösungen.** HashiCorp Vault auf CCE (empfohlen — Secrets, PKI, Dynamic Secrets), Kubernetes Secrets mit OTC KMS Encryption, oder Ansible Vault für statische Secrets. **DB-Rotation.** Secrets Manager + RDS Integration (automatische DB-Passwort-Rotation) hat kein direktes Pendant — nach CSMS-Launch ggf. über FunctionGraph + CSMS API nachbaubar.
migration.en: **CSMS not yet available.** OTC CSMS (Cloud Secret Management Service) is confirmed per roadmap but only available from 2026-05-01. Expected scope: lifecycle management for credentials with KMS encryption — whether automatic rotation, cross-region replication, and resource-based policies will be supported is still unclear. **Interim solutions.** HashiCorp Vault on CCE (recommended — secrets, PKI, dynamic secrets), Kubernetes Secrets with OTC KMS encryption, or Ansible Vault for static secrets. **DB rotation.** Secrets Manager + RDS integration (automatic DB password rotation) has no direct equivalent — after CSMS launch potentially rebuildable via FunctionGraph + CSMS API.

desc.de: Managed SSL/TLS-Zertifikate. Kostenlose Public Certificates, automatisches Renewal, ACM Private CA, Integration mit ELB/CloudFront/API Gateway.
desc.en: Managed SSL/TLS certificates. Free public certificates, automatic renewal, ACM Private CA, integration with ELB/CloudFront/API Gateway.

otcDesc.de: Kein Managed Certificate Service auf OTC. SSL Certificate Manager (SCM) existiert nicht als OTC-Service (Stand Feb 2026, per offizieller Leistungsbeschreibung bestätigt). Zertifikate müssen manuell beschafft und verwaltet werden.
otcDesc.en: No managed certificate service on OTC. SSL Certificate Manager (SCM) does not exist as an OTC service (confirmed Feb 2026 per official service description). Certificates must be procured and managed manually.

alt.de: Let's Encrypt (certbot auf ECS), HashiCorp Vault PKI, Self-managed cert lifecycle
alt.en: Let's Encrypt (certbot on ECS), HashiCorp Vault PKI, self-managed cert lifecycle

migration.de: **Kein Managed-Zertifikatsdienst.** SSL Certificate Manager (SCM) existiert nicht als OTC-Service (Stand Feb 2026, per offizieller Leistungsbeschreibung bestätigt). **Alternativen.** Let's Encrypt (certbot) für automatische Zertifikate, eigene PKI aufbauen, oder kommerzielle Zertifikate manuell verwalten. **Automatisierung.** Automatische Zertifikats-Erneuerung muss selbst implementiert werden (Cronjob mit certbot). ACM Private CA → eigene CA mit OpenSSL oder Vault PKI auf CCE. **ELB/APIG.** Zertifikate manuell hochladen und vor Ablauf erneuern.
migration.en: **No managed certificate service.** SSL Certificate Manager (SCM) does not exist as an OTC service (confirmed Feb 2026 per official service description). **Alternatives.** Let's Encrypt (certbot) for automatic certificates, build own PKI, or manage commercial certificates manually. **Automation.** Automatic certificate renewal must be implemented yourself (cronjob with certbot). ACM Private CA → own CA with OpenSSL or Vault PKI on CCE. **ELB/APIG.** Upload certificates manually and renew before expiry.

desc.de: DDoS-Schutz. Shield Standard (kostenlos, automatisch) und Shield Advanced (erweiterter Schutz, DRT-Team, Kosten-Schutz, SLA).
desc.en: DDoS protection. Shield Standard (free, automatic) and Shield Advanced (enhanced protection, DRT team, cost protection, SLA).

otcDesc.de: DDoS-Schutz für EIPs. Traffic Scrubbing, Anomalie-Erkennung, automatische Mitigation. Schützt vor SYN/UDP/HTTP Floods, CC-Attacken, SSL DoS, DNS-Attacken.
otcDesc.en: DDoS protection for EIPs. Traffic scrubbing, anomaly detection, automatic mitigation. Protects against SYN/UDP/HTTP floods, CC attacks, SSL DoS, DNS attacks.

migration.de: **Automatischer Basis-Schutz.** Anti-DDoS ist automatisch für alle Elastic IPs aktiv. Schützt vor Web-Server-Attacken (SYN flood, HTTP flood, CC), Game-Attacken (UDP flood, TCP, Fragment), HTTPS-Attacken (SSL DoS/DDoS) und DNS-Attacken (Reflection, Flood, Cache-Miss). **Kein Shield Advanced.** Kein SLA-garantierter Schutz, kein Cost Protection, kein dediziertes DDoS Response Team (DRT) — nur T-Systems Support. **Monitoring.** Attack-Statistiken und Monitoring-Reports verfügbar. **Kein CDN-Schutz.** CloudFront+Shield-Kombination hat kein Pendant (kein CDN auf OTC). Für L7-Schutz zusätzlich WAF nutzen.
migration.en: **Automatic basic protection.** Anti-DDoS is automatically active for all Elastic IPs. Protects against web server attacks (SYN flood, HTTP flood, CC), game attacks (UDP flood, TCP, fragment), HTTPS attacks (SSL DoS/DDoS), and DNS attacks (reflection, flood, cache-miss). **No Shield Advanced.** No SLA-guaranteed protection, no cost protection, no dedicated DDoS Response Team (DRT) — only T-Systems support. **Monitoring.** Attack statistics and monitoring reports available. **No CDN protection.** CloudFront+Shield combination has no equivalent (no CDN on OTC). Use WAF additionally for L7 protection.

equivNote.de: Anti-DDoS bietet automatischen L3/L4 DDoS-Schutz inkl. SYN/UDP/HTTP Flood, CC, SSL DoS und DNS-Attacken (vergleichbar Shield Standard). Kein Shield Advanced Pendant: kein dediziertes DDoS Response Team (DRT), kein Cost Protection, kein SLA-basierter Credit. Für L7-Schutz WAF nutzen.
equivNote.en: Anti-DDoS provides automatic L3/L4 DDoS protection incl. SYN/UDP/HTTP flood, CC, SSL DoS, and DNS attacks (comparable to Shield Standard). No Shield Advanced equivalent: no dedicated DDoS Response Team (DRT), no cost protection, no SLA-based credit. Use WAF for L7 protection.

tfNote.de: Anti-DDoS Basis-Schutz ist automatisch aktiv. Erweiterte Policies nur eingeschränkt per TF konfigurierbar.
tfNote.en: Anti-DDoS basic protection is automatically active. Extended policies only partially configurable via TF.

desc.de: Managed Network Firewall. Stateful/Stateless Rules, IDS/IPS, Domain Filtering, Suricata-kompatibel.
desc.en: Managed network firewall. Stateful/stateless rules, IDS/IPS, domain filtering, Suricata-compatible.

otcDesc.de: Cloud-native Firewall für Internet- und VPC-Grenzen. Intrusion Detection & Prevention (IDPS), Access Control, Traffic-Analyse, Log-Audit. Verfügbar in EU-DE, EU-NL geplant.
otcDesc.en: Cloud-native firewall for internet and VPC borders. Intrusion detection & prevention (IDPS), access control, traffic analysis, log audit. Available in EU-DE, EU-NL planned.

alt.de: Security Groups + NACLs, pfSense/OPNsense auf ECS
alt.en: Security groups + NACLs, pfSense/OPNsense on ECS

migration.de: **Regelformat-Inkompatibilität.** Suricata-kompatible Regeln aus AWS Network Firewall sind NICHT direkt übertragbar — CFW nutzt ein eigenes Regelformat. **Feature-Umfang.** CFW ist eine cloud-native Next-Gen Firewall mit IDPS, Access Control, Traffic-Analyse und Log-Audit. Stateful Inspection und Domain Filtering vorhanden. Schützt Internet- und VPC-Grenzen. **Regionale Verfügbarkeit.** In EU-DE verfügbar, EU-NL ist in Planung. IPv6-Support vorhanden. **Logging.** Log-Integration über LTS (Log Tank Service). **Kein Terraform.** CFW hat aktuell keine Terraform-Ressourcen im OTC Provider. Kein Firewall Manager Pendant für Multi-Account-Verwaltung.
migration.en: **Rule format incompatibility.** Suricata-compatible rules from AWS Network Firewall are NOT directly transferable — CFW uses its own rule format. **Feature scope.** CFW is a cloud-native next-gen firewall with IDPS, access control, traffic analysis, and log audit. Stateful inspection and domain filtering available. Protects internet and VPC borders. **Regional availability.** Available in EU-DE, EU-NL is planned. IPv6 support available. **Logging.** Log integration via LTS (Log Tank Service). **No Terraform.** CFW currently has no Terraform resources in the OTC provider. No Firewall Manager equivalent for multi-account management.

equivNote.de: CFW bietet IDPS, stateful/stateless Filterung, Domain Filtering und Traffic-Analyse. Kein Suricata-Regelformat (eigenes Format). Kein AWS Firewall Manager Pendant für zentrale Multi-Account-Policy-Verwaltung. IPv6-Support vorhanden.
equivNote.en: CFW provides IDPS, stateful/stateless filtering, domain filtering, and traffic analysis. No Suricata rule format (proprietary format). No AWS Firewall Manager equivalent for centralized multi-account policy management. IPv6 support available.

tfNote.de: CFW hat aktuell keine Terraform-Ressourcen im OTC Provider.
tfNote.en: CFW currently has no Terraform resources in the OTC provider.
